channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Cag (Clean Architecture Generator) - Wed Jul 22 13:09:12 UTC 2026
item.description:
Gere automaticamente os arquivos de uma nova feature seguindo os princípios de Clean Architecture. O plugin lê a configuração definida no arquivo .cag/config.json do...
vendor: Augusto Zanoli downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.cag.cag

item.title: Claude Sessions - Wed Jul 22 14:40:15 UTC 2026
item.description:
